payload.query: From 1960 to 1996, voter turnout in presidential elections declined despite increasing education and loosened registration laws. Discuss this literature and offer your most convincing explanation for why presidential turnout in the new millennium has rebounded.

articles.title: Ronnie Eldridge, a Fixture in N.Y. Politics, Dies at 95

articles.title: Norman Francis, 94, Who Led Xavier U. in New Orleans Into New Era, Dies
articles.abstract: He was among America’s longest-serving college presidents, with a 47-year tenure, and played an important civil-rights role in New Orleans.
